name: Almond Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt half the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Saute mushrooms for about 2 minutes until they become soft and slightly browned.
3. Add the remaining butter to the skillet, then add flour, salt, and pepper to taste.
4. Stir in the white raisins and sherry. Allow them to cook for a few moments until the sherry has absorbed into the mixture.
5. Gradually add evaporated milk while stirring continuously until the sauce thickens slightly.
6. Simmer the sauce over low heat for about 10 minutes, allowing all flavors to meld together.
7. Serve the dish topped with slivered almonds over rice or toasted bread.
This rewritten recipe maintains the original title and ingredients while ensuring clarity in instructions and consistency throughout the text.
